description:
Parent epic: V3 E8: Observability standards

Source task 7/7 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Add an integration smoke test that can run without external services.

Epic closure criteria:
- local Jidoka traces and production telemetry share correlation fields
- observability docs remain standards-friendly and dependency-light

comments.text: Added a no-provider observability smoke test that runs a real session chat turn, interrupts before provider execution, captures emitted lifecycle telemetry, inspects the request summary, and verifies the retained structured trace. Hardened hook and guardrail trace metadata to lift correlation refs from runtime inputs so session/conversation IDs are present on lifecycle events. Verified with format, compile, full tests, docs warnings-as-errors, doctor, and diff checks.

title: E8: Add an integration smoke test that can run without external services
